title: Clitandra henriquesiana
taxonomy: Clitandra henriquesiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to West Africa and is a part of the Clitandra genus. The plant is classified under the kingdom Plantae, and its full classification is Plantae > Magnoliophyta > Magnoliopsida > Apocynaceae > Clitandra > Clitandra henriquesiana. The classification of Clitandra henriquesiana reflects its botanical relationships and evolutionary history. Further research on the plant's classification may be necessary to confirm its exact position within the plant kingdom.
